speaker:
DUKE
               
              FREDERICK
text: Not see him since? Sir, sir, that cannot be.

speaker:
DUKE
               
              FREDERICK
text: But were I not the better part made mercy,

speaker:
DUKE
               
              FREDERICK
text: I should not seek an absent argument

speaker:
DUKE
               
              FREDERICK
text: Of my revenge, thou present. But look to it:

speaker:
DUKE
               
              FREDERICK
text: Find out thy brother wheresoe’er he is.

speaker:
DUKE
               
              FREDERICK
text: Seek him with candle. Bring him, dead or living,

speaker:
DUKE
               
              FREDERICK
text: Within this twelvemonth, or turn thou no more

speaker:
DUKE
               
              FREDERICK
text: To seek a living in our territory.

speaker:
DUKE
               
              FREDERICK
text: Thy lands and all things that thou dost call thine,

speaker:
DUKE
               
              FREDERICK
text: Worth seizure, do we seize into our hands

speaker:
DUKE
               
              FREDERICK
text: Till thou canst quit thee by thy brother’s mouth

speaker:
DUKE
               
              FREDERICK
text: Of what we think against thee.

speaker: OLIVER
text: O, that your Highness knew my heart in this:

speaker: OLIVER
text: I never loved my brother in my life.

speaker:
DUKE
               
              FREDERICK
text: More villain thou.—Well, push him out of doors,

speaker:
DUKE
               
              FREDERICK
text: And let my officers of such a nature

speaker:
DUKE
               
              FREDERICK
text: Make an extent upon his house and lands.

speaker:
DUKE
               
              FREDERICK
text: Do this expediently, and turn him going.
